title: derris rariflora
intro: Derris rariflora, also known as the golden shower tree, is a plant native to tropical Africa and Asia, belonging to the family Leguminosae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to repel insects and kill parasites, due to its rotenone content. The health benefits of Derris rariflora include its use as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, as well as a treatment for various skin conditions and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Derris rariflora include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
